{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Berry Award
|class_id=20213
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The Golden Berry Award chooses the worst Murikan film of the year. At first, it was a spontaneous amusement created by movie fans but later attracted the public's attention. Now it has become a highly popular awarding ceremony, where there are no worst movies, only the worse!
|fame=16
|art=16
|fth=16
|civ=26
|tech=16
|ss1=Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +4<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50
|ss2=Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +8<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50
|ss3=Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +12<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50
|ss4=Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +12<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50
|ss7=Per 5 Orange Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +12<br>Orange Fungi Eaten: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
